name: gpt-computer-use-electron-react
description: A barebones Electron React computer-use loop backed by OpenAI Responses computer use.

scripts.check: node --check scripts/build-driver.js && node --check scripts/start-vite-electron.js && node --check lib/gptcua.cjs && node --check electron/main.cjs && node --check electron/preload.cjs && npm run build
